overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a futuristic cyberpunk game showing a character walking through a heavy rainstorm in a dystopian urban environment. The scene features industrial architecture with neon yellow accents, wet reflective surfaces, palm trees, and futuristic vehicles passing by on the flooded streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: rain-soaked sidewalk with concrete retaining wall

events.description: futuristic black sedan drives past on the left side of the frame

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk through heavy rainfall

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan with glowing red taillights driving past on the wet road

entered.detail: tall concrete wall with metal railings on top, covered in rain and moss
large curved overpass structure spanning across the background
massive industrial building with yellow crane arm and green neon accents
tall palm trees visible in the distance against the gray sky
rain-soaked asphalt street with puddles reflecting the surroundings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow sidewalk bordered by a high concrete retaining wall on the right and a busy street on the left. Heavy rain creates a hazy atmosphere as futuristic vehicles drive past on the wet road. The character walks forward toward an elevated highway overpass visible in the distance, with a massive industrial stadium structure looming on the left.

events.description: military-style truck with green body drives past on the left

agents.ego_description: continuing forward and approaching other pedestrians walking in the same direction

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: covered bus stop structure with glass panels and metal frame

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the sidewalk, passing a bus stop shelter on the right. The crowd density increases slightly with several pedestrians visible ahead walking in the same direction. Military-style vehicles drive past on the wet road to the left as the environment gradually opens up toward an intersection in the distance.

events.description: turning left from narrow sidewalk into wide open plaza area
camera pans to reveal large digital billboard on building facade

agents.ego_description: turning left into the plaza and moving toward the center of the open area

entered.detail: massive digital screen displaying yellow and black graphics with NC logo
wide open paved area with scattered debris and puddles
large curved concrete wall with damage and weathering on the right side

segments.scene_description: The character turns left into a wide open plaza, leaving the narrow sidewalk behind. A massive digital billboard displaying yellow neon graphics dominates the left side of the frame, mounted on a towering industrial building. Palm trees stand in the center of the plaza as the camera moves through the rain-soaked open area, revealing a damaged curved wall structure on the right.

events.description: approaching large pile of rubble and collapsed building structure

agents.ego_description: walking toward the rubble-strewn area at the end of the plaza

notable_agents.action: green military truck driving through the plaza toward the rubble

entered.detail: large pile of concrete rubble and debris blocking the path ahead
twisted metal framework and destroyed scaffolding in the center
bright yellow neon signs and advertisements on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through the open plaza toward a heavily damaged area filled with rubble and collapsed structures. The large curved wall on the right becomes more prominent as the character approaches. A military truck drives past on the right while the camera focuses on the destruction ahead, featuring twisted metal and concrete debris blocking the path through the rain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-drenched urban corridor that gradually expands from a narrow sidewalk into a devastated open plaza. It begins along a confined walkway bordered by a high concrete wall and a busy street, moving past a looming industrial stadium as futuristic vehicles blur through the haze. As the character passes a bus stop and a growing crowd of pedestrians, the environment opens up toward a wide intersection where military vehicles patrol the wet roads. The scene then shifts as the camera turns left into a sprawling plaza, transitioning from the tight street to an open area dominated by a massive yellow neon billboard and scattered palm trees. Finally, the movement carries the character past a damaged curved wall and a passing military truck, ending amidst a landscape of twisted metal and concrete rubble.
